data.prompt: Top 1/3 of frame is empty negative space, dark guilloche-etched sky. Bottom 2/3 contains an open brass safety deposit box overflowing with gold coins and loose diamonds, a key hanging from the lock, a vault wall of matching boxes at the edges.
